summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a solid 1992 show with standout Tennessee Jed and China>Rider performances
review: Both reviewers praise the crisp, superb sound quality of this sound‑board source and note that the band delivers a solid, typical early‑'90s performance. Highlights cited are an almost perfect Tennessee Jed featuring a great Jerry solo and a fun China>Rider segue, while the overall setlist is described as strong and representative of the era.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) highlight a high‑quality recording and a solid performance with notable song moments, supporting a rating in the upper‑mid range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as great, crisp, and superb with no noted flaws or dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid, well‑balanced setlist typical of the early ’90s period; reviewers find it enjoyable and representative of what the band could deliver at that time.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Great solo on Tennessee Jed; health noted as declining during this era but performance still strong.
